blurb: Emergency SOS via Satellite allows iPhone 14 and later models to communicate with emergency services when no cellular or Wi-Fi network is available. A custom message compression algorithm transmits emergency text over the limited bandwidth of direct-to-satellite connections. Users are guided to point their device at the satellite using an on-screen pointing interface. Emergency data is routed through relay centers staffed by specialists who contact local emergency services on the user's behalf. The feature is designed as a last-resort emergency service for situations where no other communication infrastructure is reachable.
